AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Etgo_Total_Discount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total discount percentage applied to this document by Etendo GO.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Stores the total discount percentage set by the user in the Etendo GO interface. Etendo GO uses this value to insert a negative discount line on the document and to restore the discount panel when the document is reopened. This field is managed exclusively by Etendo GO — do not edit it manually in Classic, as doing so will not recalculate the discount line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Total Discount %
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total discount percentage applied to this document by Etendo GO.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Stores the total discount percentage set by the user in the Etendo GO interface. Etendo GO uses this value to insert a negative discount line on the document and to restore the discount panel when the document is reopened. This field is managed exclusively by Etendo GO — do not edit it manually in Classic, as doing so will not recalculate the discount line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Is Person
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the business partner is a person (Y) or a company (N).
AD_FIELD.HELP: When set to Y, the Contacts window displays first name and last name fields instead of the commercial name. Defaults to N (company).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Discount %
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The proportional discount given to an item, without respect to any previously defined discounts.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Discount indicates the discount applied or taken as a percentage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Identifier
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The sequence indicates the order for the properties within the identifier.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The sequence indicates the order for the properties within the identifier.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Total Discount %
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total discount percentage applied to this document by Etendo GO.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Stores the total discount percentage set by the user in the Etendo GO interface. Etendo GO uses this value to insert a negative discount line on the document and to restore the discount panel when the document is reopened. This field is managed exclusively by Etendo GO — do not edit it manually in Classic, as doing so will not recalculate the discount line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Etgo_Total_Discount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total discount percentage applied to this document by Etendo GO.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Stores the total discount percentage set by the user in the Etendo GO interface. Etendo GO uses this value to insert a negative discount line on the document and to restore the discount panel when the document is reopened. This field is managed exclusively by Etendo GO — do not edit it manually in Classic, as doing so will not recalculate the discount line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Total Discount %
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total discount percentage applied to this document by Etendo GO.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Stores the total discount percentage set by the user in the Etendo GO interface. Etendo GO uses this value to insert a negative discount line on the document and to restore the discount panel when the document is reopened. This field is managed exclusively by Etendo GO — do not edit it manually in Classic, as doing so will not recalculate the discount line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Email
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An email address for a specified business partner.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Email Address is the Electronic Mail ID for this User and should be fully qualified (e.g. joe.smith@company.com).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Discount %
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The proportional discount given to an item, without respect to any previously defined discounts.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Discount indicates the discount applied or taken as a percentage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Web
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A website URL for a specified business partner.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Web field identifies the website associated with the record.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Phone
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A telephone number for a specified business partner.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Phone field identifies a telephone number
